---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for LectureMind-AI
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is blocked or slowed down today?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you prefer the proposed one.

## User group helped

Which users benefit most? (students / educators / teaching assistants / self-learners / contributors)

## Implementation notes

(Optional) Affected components, schema/API changes, model/prompt considerations, security implications, or links to related issues.
